feed.title: Verity Mod verified route updates
feed.subtitle: Point-in-time checks of current Minecraft Java and Bedrock Verity project records.

entry.title: Verity JE 5.7.2 remains the current Forge 1.20.1 route
entry.summary: Checked record 8450350: verity-5.7.2.jar, Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1, displayed size 235.06 MB.

entry.title: Verity BE Stable 1.0.8 remains the current Bedrock 26.30 route
entry.summary: Checked record 8420981: Verity Stable 1.0.8 for Bedrock 26.30, displayed size 18.80 MB.

entry.title: PnTMC Verity 2.1.0 remains a separate Bedrock 26.30 route
entry.summary: Checked record 8327253: ThatMob's Verity 2.1.0 by PnTMC for Bedrock 26.30, displayed size 35.45 MB.
